# Icon placeholders

Binary PNG icons were intentionally removed to keep the PR text-only for Codex compatibility.

Before release, add these PNG assets at the same paths:

- `icon-1024.png`
- `icon-512.png`
- `icon-192.png`
- `apple-touch-icon.png`
- `favicon-32x32.png`
- `favicon-16x16.png`

The app currently points to `slash-icon.svg` as a temporary text-based placeholder.
